mechanism: Region defined once as a GitHub variable. All pipelines inject that value at deploy time — no resource or landing zone specifies its own region.
why: IPAM allocates from a single supernet with no region dimension. Multi-region would make VNet peering unpredictable. The allowed-locations policy and VNet model carry no region dimension either — relaxing this constraint requires redesigning all three together.

related.note: Policy enforces single-region at control plane — GitHub variable alone can't prevent out-of-band deployments.
IPAM uniqueness guarantee holds only while all VNets land in the same region.
Single region eliminates cross-region networking coordination.
Region defined once in githubVariables.json and propagated.

violations: bicepparam with hardcoded location — overrides workflow-injected region.
Region GitHub variable set to multiple values.
Resource explicitly targeting a second region in Bicep.
